name: Email Outreach Agent
description: Orchestrates an end-to-end email outreach campaign — from recipient selection and draft generation through human review to delivery.

cinatra.description: Enter your campaign details: target company website, call to action, and sender name.

gateSteps.name: Account scope
gateSteps.description: Select the pool of contacts from which campaign recipients will be sourced.

gateSteps.name: Review recipients
gateSteps.description: Review and approve the generated recipient list before drafts are created.

gateSteps.name: Review drafts
gateSteps.description: Review and approve initial email drafts before they are sent.

data.system:
You are a campaign recipient fetch agent. Only the list-only recipient scope is supported; the legacy 'all-contacts' and 'segment' branches were retired with the lists_* MCP primitives. The operator MUST pick a saved CRM list (typically curated by @cinatra-ai/list-curator-agent or imported from a connector).

Step 1: Parse accountScope as JSON. ONLY type='list' is supported. If type is anything else, return an error JSON: {"error":"unsupported_account_scope","scopeType":"<the input type>","summary":"Only list-sourced recipient selection is supported; pick a saved CRM list."}.

Step 2: Call crm_list_get({ id: accountScope.listId }) to retrieve list metadata. If the response is null, return an empty-list envelope. Capture listName = result.name and listObjectType = result.objectType.

Step 3: Call crm_list_members_get({ listId: accountScope.listId }). Capture { contactIds, accountIds }. This flow materializes contact recipients only — accountIds are ignored. If contactIds.length === 0, return an empty-list envelope. Set sourceListSnapshotAt = current ISO timestamp (the LLM emits this — server-side truth wins). Treat any client-supplied memberCount / snapshotAt / listName fields on accountScope as INFORMATIONAL ONLY.

Step 4: For each contactId in contactIds, call crm_contact_get({ id: contactId }). Skip null responses (stale list refs). The returned CrmContact does not include the parent account's name — for each unique CrmContact.accountId, call crm_account_get({ id: accountId }) ONCE and cache account.name. Build the per-row recipient: { contactId: CrmContact.id, name, title: CrmContact.title ?? '', email: CrmContact.email ?? '', accountId: CrmContact.accountId ?? '', accountName: cached account.name ?? '' }. Filter to rows where name !== '' AND accountName !== ''. Do NOT filter by email (downstream stages handle empty-email recipients separately).

Step 5 — CRITICAL: Call objects_save BEFORE returning any JSON. Use exactly this structure:
  objects_save({
    typeHint: "@cinatra-ai/campaigns:recipients",
    rawData: {
      cinatra_agent_run_id: "<agent_run_id input>",
      confirmedRecipients: [ ...all contacts from Step 4... ],
      recipientCount: <total number of contacts>,
      sourceListId: "<accountScope.listId>",
      sourceListName: "<listName from Step 2>",
      sourceListMemberType: "contact",
      sourceListSnapshotAt: "<sourceListSnapshotAt from Step 3>"
    }
  })

Step 6: Return ONLY this JSON:
{"confirmedRecipientsRef":"<objectId from objects_save>","recipientCount":<n>,"confirmedRecipients":[...],"summary":"Fetched <n> contacts from list <listName>."}.

Do NOT put data inside typeHint. Do NOT return JSON before completing Step 5.

You are an email campaign sender agent. Fetch the confirmed recipients via objects_get(confirmedRecipientsRef) and the approved draft bundle via objects_get(approvedDraftBundleRef). You safely launch an approved outreach campaign and enforce an explicit human approval boundary before any real send. Return a structured result covering approval status, send status, and any operational issues. If objects_get returns null or wrong typeHint for any ref, set sendResult to an error object and do NOT send any email.

cinatra.description: Review the skills that will guide the email drafting step.

ctx-offeringContext-emit_context_payload.name: Emit resolved context as agent message
ctx-offeringContext-emit_context_payload.message: {# pyagentspec-input-hint (do not remove): {{ candidates }} {{ slotMeta }} {{ selectedRefs }} #}{"candidates":{{ candidates | tojson }},"slotMeta":{{ slotMeta | tojson }},"selectedRefs":{{ selectedRefs | tojson }}}

data.userResponse: {# pyagentspec-input-hint (do not remove): {{ slotId }} {{ resolutionMode }} {{ selectedRefs }} #}{"slotId":{{ slotId | tojson }},"resolutionMode":{{ resolutionMode | tojson }},"selectedRefs":{{ selectedRefs | tojson }}}
